text: "The number."... The difference of the numbers here and 2 Kings 24. is to be accounted for, by supposing the greater number to be that which was really found, and the lesser to be that which Joab gave.
"Six hundred sicles."... This was the price of the whole place, on which the temple was afterwards built; but the price of the oxen was fifty sicles of silver (2 Kings 24:24).
